2.
3.

[What should happen]

[What actually happens]

[Attach or link here]

**Business / User Impact**

**Suggested Severity** (optional — triage confirms)

**Suggested Priority** (optional — triage confirms)

---

**Security note:** Do not paste exploit details, secrets, or attack steps here. Use private vulnerability reporting / `SECURITY.md` when available.

**Triage reminder:** Maintainer applies exactly one category (`bug` / `enhancement`) and one state (`needs-triage` → `needs-info` | `ready-for-agent` | `ready-for-human` | `wontfix`), plus `severity/s*` and `priority/p*`. See `docs/agents/triage-labels.md` and Living SOP §5–§6.
